description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof and a single wooden door on one side. The main body is constructed from a tan, stucco-like material, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance. A wooden pergola extends from the main building, supported by thick posts and beams, creating a shaded open area. Adjacent to the pergola is a green fabric awning, stretched between two wooden poles, providing additional shade or shelter. The kiosk includes a small, barred window on one side, and the door is reinforced with visible wooden planks and metal hinges. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for use as a street-side vendor or information booth in an urban environment.
description: A rustic, tan kiosk with a flat roof, wooden door, pergola extension, and green fabric awning, featuring a small barred window and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat roof, main kiosk body, and the green fabric awning extending outward.
description_view_1: View highlighting the wooden door, pergola beams, and the green awning directly in front of the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pergola's wooden beams and the open structure beneath the flat roof.
description_view_3: Side view showing the small barred window and the open pergola area adjacent to the main kiosk.
attribute_window_presence: one small barred window on the side, rectangular
attribute_door_configuration: one single wooden door on the front side
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhang, made of stucco or similar material, pergola extension with exposed wooden beams
